value.rationale: This is a generative image tool embedded within Google's Antigravity agent product (powered by Nano Banana 2), used specifically to produce UI mockups and web previews. It is a first-party image generation capability, making it a partial/feature-level entry under image-video-generation (images only, no video), and a sub-feature of the google-antigravity-2-0 product rather than a standalone product.
